title: verbascum × sivasicum
intro: Verbascum × sivasicum, also known as Sivas' mullein or hybrid mullein, is a cross between Verbascum chaixii and Verbascum phoeniceum, two species of mullein plants. This flowering perennial is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × sivasicum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health ailments. Verbascum × sivasicum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
